title: ECSF official Sovereignty assessment calculator — specific objectives
description: The Cloud III DPS tender's official calculator XLSX (Annex - Sovereignty assessment calculator.xlsx) breaks each ECSF Sovereignty Objective into 'specific objectives' (48 total across SOV-1..SOV-8), each with a question/description, a list of answer options with point values, and a per-answer SEAL level. This is an operationalization layer distinct from the 30 normative v1.2.1 contributing factors (ecsf.json) — see docs/DECISIONS.md on why the two are kept separate. The sheet's own 'Score' column is a fictitious worked example per its own disclaimer and is never captured here. Several source rows are blank or malformed (merged-cell artifacts); these are captured as-is with needs_review rather than repaired.

coverageHint.description: Provisional, unverified mapping to the v1.2.1 contributing factor(s) this specific objective operationalizes, encoded per the CR-1 pattern (docs/DECISIONS.md D-013).
